decisions.decision: Make AllianceNomination constructor accept either nested organizations data OR organizationNominationIds (mirror OrganizationNomination pattern)
decisions.rationale: Supabase adapter reverse-fill (v2.6 P64) populates organizationNominationIds without nested data. Constructor previously crashed unconditionally on data.organizations.length. Type updated to make organizations optional; createDeterministicId.ts non-null assertion is safe (only reachable from nested-data path).

decisions.decision: Seed must write the FULL results block in app_settings (not just sections diff)
decisions.rationale: Client-side mergeAppSettings (apps/frontend/src/lib/utils/settings.ts) is shallow Object.assign at root keys, not deep-merge. Plan 67-01 incorrectly assumed deep-merge symmetry between server (jsonb merge_jsonb_column) and client. Partial seed → cardContents wiped → results page crash.

decisions.decision: Defensive optional-chain on appSettings.results.cardContents reads at all 3 sites (EntityCard.svelte:121,137 + entityCards.ts:25 + voterContext.svelte.ts:361)
decisions.rationale: Defense-in-depth — partial dynamic settings should not crash the results page regardless of merge logic.

decisions.decision: Defer alliance-tab rendering to a follow-up todo with three remediation lanes documented
decisions.rationale: The immediate Phase 67 SCs are met (data flows, reverse-fill exercised, matching/filters clean, parity gate green). Alliance card render path is a UX design decision that requires its own scope.

context_notes: Phase 67 was the v2.6 P64 reverse-fill validation phase. It empirically exercised an adapter code path that had shipped but never been used with real alliance data. As designed, the smoke surfaced 3 latent bugs (AllianceNomination constructor, partial settings shallow merge, missing optional-chain on cardContents) that would have shipped to first customer with alliance authoring. All 3 fixed atomically. The phase delivered exactly what SC-3 promised: 'the previously dev-blind path is now empirically exercised.' Mid-session the user invoked /gsd-do to capture a Phase-65-01 bind-comments cleanup follow-up, but the routing to /gsd-add-todo did not complete because they immediately redirected back to fixing the runtime crash. That bind-comments cleanup todo should be captured before resuming.

anti_patterns.name: Settings shallow-merge asymmetry
anti_patterns.description: Server-side merge_jsonb_column deep-merges JSONB; client-side mergeAppSettings is shallow Object.assign at root keys. Plan 67-01 assumed symmetry and wrote a partial results override, which the client merge then used to REPLACE the entire results block, wiping cardContents/showFeedbackPopup/showSurveyPopup defaults.
anti_patterns.prevention: When writing dynamic settings overrides in dev-seed, mirror the FULL TS-default shape from packages/app-shared/src/settings/dynamicSettings.ts. Only diff leaf values; never write a partial sub-object.

anti_patterns.name: Vite dep-optimization cache stale after package rebuild
anti_patterns.description: After @openvaa/* package rebuild, Vite's node_modules/.vite/ cache holds the OLD bundled dist. Restarting yarn dev does NOT invalidate this cache. Symptom: identical crash persists despite the fix being in dist/index.js.
anti_patterns.prevention: After rebuilding any @openvaa/* package consumed by apps/frontend, run `rm -rf apps/frontend/node_modules/.vite` before restarting yarn dev. Worth documenting in CLAUDE.md if not already.

anti_patterns.name: Playwright parity-gate setup contamination
anti_patterns.description: Running `yarn dev:reset-with-data` (default template) before Playwright contaminates the DB because tests/tests/setup/data.setup.ts only clears test- prefix rows, not seed-. Both datasets coexist → 40 questions instead of 20 → 20 voter-app tests timeout at q18/40 → false-positive parity FAIL of 30p/21f/51c.
anti_patterns.prevention: Phase 66 66-VALIDATION.md:73-82 protocol: `yarn supabase:reset` (clean DB) before Playwright. Now also documented in 67-VERIFICATION.md. Consider promoting to CLAUDE.md or adding a guard in the parity-gate script.
